title: festuca ingrata
intro: Festuca ingrata, also known as bitter fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Festuca ingrata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments.
